LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HUMBERTO RUIZ'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON REQUEST FOR WRIT OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOTION IS BASED ON THE VERIFIED SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THAT DOCUMENT ALLEGES THAT ALFONSO RUIZ HAS POSSESSION OF THE ART WORKS. HOWEVER, ALFONSO RUIZ FILED A NOTICE OF STAY DUE TO HIS FILING OF A BANKRUPTCY CASE AND THUS THIS COURT LACKS THE AUTHORITY TO GRANT THE MOTION. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION, 302, (AMENDED) NOTICE AND MOTION OF PLTF FOR HEARING ON REQUEST FOR WRIT OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF HUMBERTO RUIZ'S (AMENDED) MOTION FOR HEARING ON REQUEST FOR WRIT OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND, WITHOUT REVIEWING THE MOVING PAPERS AND EVEN THOUGH NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED, THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE IF THE MOTION SHOULD BE GRANTED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA CSR # 5153. (302)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-12-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS REQUESTS CONTINUANCE OF TODAY'S HEARING. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF HUMBERTO RUIZ'S HEARING ON REQUEST FOR WRIT OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 19, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT ARE ORDERED TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PLEADINGS FILED FOR TODAY'S HEARING BE DELIVERED TO THE COURTROOM AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
